---
title: "Using Geocomputation to explore the active travel impacts of new roads and railways"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Malcolm Morgan (2018). Using Geocomputation to explore the active travel impacts of new roads and railways. *GISRUK*."
date: "2018-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_using_2018"
citation-type: "paper-conference"
citation-type-label: "Conference Paper"
venue: "GISRUK"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Malcolm Morgan"
---

**Type:** Conference Paper
**Venue:** GISRUK
**Year:** 2018

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Malcolm Morgan (2018). Using Geocomputation to explore the active travel impacts of new roads and railways. *GISRUK*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@inproceedings{lovelace_using_2018,
  title = {Using {{Geocomputation}} to Explore the Active Travel Impacts of New Roads and Railways},
  booktitle = {{{GISRUK}}},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Morgan, Malcolm},
  year = {2018},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
